sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀνδρόνικος

- Transliteration: Andronikos

- Phonetic: an-dron'-ee-kos

- Definition: Andronicus = "man of victory"

1. a Jewish Christian and a kinsman of Paul

- Origin: from G435 and G3534

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G435 and G3534; man of victory; Andronicos an Israelite: - Andronicus.
